name: curb-appeal
description: Design and build premium, conversion-focused websites for local businesses.

interface.longDescription: A complete workflow for strategy, visual direction, copy, implementation, SEO, accessibility, responsive behavior, and QA for salons, law firms, restaurants, and other local businesses.
interface.defaultPrompt: Build a premium, responsive, conversion-focused website for this local business using the existing codebase and the Curb Appeal workflow.
